requirement_topic.en: EgyptERA Grid, License, and Tariff Context
requirement_topic.zh: EgyptERA 电网、许可和电价背景
requirement_topic.zht: EgyptERA 電網、許可和電價背景

summary.en: EgyptERA is the electricity utility regulator and publishes electricity laws, regulations, codes, permits / license procedures, and an electric vehicle charging tariff. EV charging projects should therefore separate product compliance from site connection, operator licensing, tariff, and utility-interface questions.
summary.zh: EgyptERA 是埃及电力监管机构，并发布电力法律、法规、规范、许可证程序以及电动汽车充电电价。因此，充电项目应将产品合规与站点接入、运营许可、电价和电力公司接口问题分开处理。
summary.zht: EgyptERA 是埃及電力監管機構，並發布電力法律、法規、規範、許可證程序以及電動汽車充電電價。因此，充電項目應將產品合規與站點接入、營運許可、電價和電力公司介面問題分開處理。

summary.en: GB-standard cn_common_equivalent: GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 can show product-side conductive charging evidence, but China-side reports do not establish Egyptian site connection, tariff eligibility, operator licensing, or distribution-network approval.
summary.zh: GB标准中国常见对应：GB/T 18487 和 GB/T 20234 可展示产品侧传导充电证据，但中国侧报告不能证明埃及站点接入、电价适用、运营许可或配电网批准。
summary.zht: GB標準中國常見對應：GB/T 18487 和 GB/T 20234 可展示產品側傳導充電證據，但中國側報告不能證明埃及站點接入、電價適用、營運許可或配電網批准。

gap.en: Prepare site single-line diagrams, load calculations, protection coordination, earthing details, metering / tariff assumptions, utility application documents, operator authorization evidence, and commissioning records in addition to product test reports.
gap.zh: 除产品测试报告外，还应准备站点单线图、负荷计算、保护配合、接地细节、计量/电价假设、电力公司申请文件、运营方授权证据和调试记录。
gap.zht: 除產品測試報告外，還應準備站點單線圖、負荷計算、保護配合、接地細節、計量/電價假設、電力公司申請文件、營運方授權證據和調試記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where EgyptERA law, licensing, tariff, distribution-company connection, or site electrical approval applies; scope depends on business model and site
mandatory_status.cn: China product GB/T evidence does not replace project-specific utility, installation, or operator approval

source.publisher: Egyptian Electric Utility and Consumer Protection Regulatory Agency (EgyptERA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product test reports are not enough for an Egypt charging site; EgyptERA, tariff, utility, and site-approval questions need a separate file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品测试报告不足以覆盖埃及充电站点；EgyptERA、电价、电力公司和站点批准问题需要单独资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品測試報告不足以覆蓋埃及充電站點；EgyptERA、電價、電力公司和站點批准問題需要單獨資料包。
